title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
description:
In an alternate world where the Holy Britannian Empire has conquered Japan and renamed it Area 11, exiled prince Lelouch Lamperouge lives as an ordinary student while secretly hating the empire that destroyed his family and oppressed millions of people. His life changes when he encounters a mysterious girl named C.C., who grants him the power of Geass — an ability that allows him to command anyone to obey his orders without question.

Using the identity of the masked revolutionary known as Zero, Lelouch begins leading a rebellion against Britannia in order to create a better world for his younger sister, Nunnally. As wars, betrayals, and political conflicts escalate, Lelouch becomes trapped between his ideals, friendships, and the consequences of his actions. Filled with intense battles, strategic mind games, emotional sacrifices, and shocking twists, Code Geass tells a powerful story about power, justice, revenge, and the cost of changing the world.
